productDisplayName: Converse Men's All Star HI Navy Blue Canvas Shoe
description: Up your style quotient with these classic Chuck Taylor high ankle shoes from converse. Team this comfy pair of sneakers with jeans and bioworld tees for a great casual look.Upper Canvas upper for durability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Metal eyelets for the laces for greater eye appeal and durability All Star heel patch on the ankle Rubber toe box for greater protection Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi0directional pattern for greater grip and durability shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
